'''Outpost''' was a small [[Water/Legends|frozen]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located in the [[Bissillirus system/Legends|Bissillirus system]]. It was the outermost planet and covered in frozen [[Ammonia/Legends|ammonia]]. [[Unilliten Industries]] once established a large research facility on the world, the purpose of which was kept secret.

{{Planet-stub}}
